name: @threecyborgs/wasm-box3d
description: WebAssembly build and JavaScript loader for Box3D.

scripts.build:wasm:single: if [ -z "${EMSDK_PYTHON:-}" ] && [ -x /opt/homebrew/opt/python@3.14/bin/python3.14 ]; then export EMSDK_PYTHON=/opt/homebrew/opt/python@3.14/bin/python3.14; fi; emcmake cmake -S . -B ../../build/wasm-box3d -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DWB3_ENABLE_PTHREADS=OFF -DWB3_ENABLE_MEMORY64=OFF && cmake --build ../../build/wasm-box3d --config Release
scripts.build:wasm:pthreads: if [ -z "${EMSDK_PYTHON:-}" ] && [ -x /opt/homebrew/opt/python@3.14/bin/python3.14 ]; then export EMSDK_PYTHON=/opt/homebrew/opt/python@3.14/bin/python3.14; fi; emcmake cmake -S . -B ../../build/wasm-box3d-pthreads -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DWB3_ENABLE_PTHREADS=ON -DWB3_ENABLE_MEMORY64=OFF && cmake --build ../../build/wasm-box3d-pthreads --config Release
scripts.build:wasm: npm run build:wasm:single && npm run build:wasm:pthreads
scripts.prepack: npm run build:wasm && npm run build
